info.name: 011 EMPLOYER_PROGRAM
info.description: Employer Program E2E: Auth, Employer Setup (create institution, employer, CRUD), Program Config (create/get/update benefits program), Employee Management (enroll single, list, subscribe, bulk CSV, deactivate), Domain Management (add/blacklist/list/remove), Billing (generate/list/detail/cron), Cleanup. Variables: superAdminUsername, superAdminPassword, adminUsername, adminPassword set in environment or globals.
